name: revit_export_view_3d_mesh_json
description: Exports tessellated 3D mesh geometry from a 3D view to ADN mesh JSON format (vertices, indices, normals, centroid, color, element id per mesh).

view_id.description: 3D view to export (defaults to active view)

output_path.description: Path for the output JSON file (if omitted, a save dialog is shown)

notes: Replace SaveFileDialog with output_path parameter for headless MCP execution. Active view must be a 3D view.
